description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a dark gabled roof and light-colored exterior walls. The front facade is adorned with a small covered porch, flanked by landscaped garden beds and a central walkway leading to the entrance. The property includes a detached garage and a backyard area with a large rectangular swimming pool and a paved patio. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear, with additional side windows providing ample natural light. The lot is bordered by a uniform fence and includes paved driveways and walkways connecting the main house, garage, and pool area. The overall design is reminiscent of a classic suburban Craftsman bungalow with modern amenities.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior, front porch, detached garage, and backyard pool, all enclosed by a fence. The property features symmetrical windows, landscaped gardens, and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, landscaped gardens, and central walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gabled roof profile, driveway, garage, and partial view of the pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, large swimming pool, and back porch area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and side windows of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
